description: Stores customer profiles and contact details.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer (Primary Key).

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Legal first name of the customer.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Legal last name of the customer.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Primary email address used for communication and login.

columns.name: address
columns.description: Shipping or billing address street and house number.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: DateTime when the user account was created.
